'''ât-th-g''' ('''katathag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monumentalise|monumentalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monumentalise|monumentalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-th-g
|-
! Lemma
| katathag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitathag|thitathag]] || [[word:jitathag|jitathag]] || [[word:shitathag|shitathag]] || [[word:kitathag|kitathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutathag|thuthutathag]] || [[word:jujutathag|jujutathag]] || [[word:shushutathag|shushutathag]] || [[word:kukutathag|kukutathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutathag|thutathag]] || [[word:jutathag|jutathag]] || [[word:shutathag|shutathag]] || [[word:kutathag|kutathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutathag|thutathag]] || [[word:jutathag|jutathag]] || [[word:shutathag|shutathag]] || [[word:kutathag|kutathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetathag|thetathag]] || [[word:jetathag|jetathag]] || [[word:shetathag|shetathag]] || [[word:ketathag|ketathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotathag|thothotathag]] || [[word:jojotathag|jojotathag]] || [[word:shoshotathag|shoshotathag]] || [[word:kokotathag|kokotathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotathag|thotathag]] || [[word:jotathag|jotathag]] || [[word:shotathag|shotathag]] || [[word:kotathag|kotathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotathag|thotathag]] || [[word:jotathag|jotathag]] || [[word:shotathag|shotathag]] || [[word:kotathag|kotathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtathag|thĂŠtathag]] || [[word:jĂŠtathag|jĂŠtathag]] || [[word:shĂŠtathag|shĂŠtathag]] || [[word:kĂŠtathag|kĂŠtathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatathag|thathatathag]] || [[word:jajatathag|jajatathag]] || [[word:shashatathag|shashatathag]] || [[word:kakatathag|kakatathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatathag|thatathag]] || [[word:jatathag|jatathag]] || [[word:shatathag|shatathag]] || [[word:katathag|katathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatathag|thatathag]] || [[word:jatathag|jatathag]] || [[word:shatathag|shatathag]] || [[word:katathag|katathag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatathag|shatathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatathag|goshatathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatathag|gokishatathag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatathagnĂŒ|shatathagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatathagnknĂŒ|goshatathagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathagnĂŒ|gokishatathagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatathagshĂ«|shatathagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatathagnkshĂ«|goshatathagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatathagshĂ«|gokishatathagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathagro|shatathagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathagnkro|goshatathagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathagro|gokishatathagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathagmu|shatathagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathagnkmu|goshatathagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathagmu|gokishatathagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatathagsher|shatathagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatathagnksher|goshatathagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatathagsher|gokishatathagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatathagng|shatathagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatathagnkng|goshatathagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatathagng|gokishatathagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatathagya|shatathagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatathagnkya|goshatathagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatathagya|gokishatathagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatathagyam|shatathagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatathagnkyam|goshatathagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatathagyam|gokishatathagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathagnĂŒshĂ«|shatathagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatathagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatathagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathagnĂŒro|shatathagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathagnknĂŒro|goshatathagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathagnĂŒro|gokishatathagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathagnĂŒmu|shatathagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathagnknĂŒmu|goshatathagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathagnĂŒmu|gokishatathagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathagshĂ«nĂŒ|shatathagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatathagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatathagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathagshĂ«ro|shatathagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathagnkshĂ«ro|goshatathagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathagshĂ«ro|gokishatathagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathagshĂ«mu|shatathagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathagnkshĂ«mu|goshatathagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathagshĂ«mu|gokishatathagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathagronĂŒ|shatathagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathagnkronĂŒ|goshatathagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathagronĂŒ|gokishatathagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathagroshĂ«|shatathagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathagnkroshĂ«|goshatathagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathagroshĂ«|gokishatathagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatathagromu|shatathagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatathagnkromu|goshatathagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatathagromu|gokishatathagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatathagmunĂŒ|shatathagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatathagnkmunĂŒ|goshatathagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatathagmunĂŒ|gokishatathagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatathagmushĂ«|shatathagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatathagnkmushĂ«|goshatathagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatathagmushĂ«|gokishatathagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatathagmuro|shatathagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatathagnkmuro|goshatathagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatathagmuro|gokishatathagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
